record.field: HR Employee: internal users read self; HR officers read all

['|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('id', '=', user.employee_id.id)] if user.has_group('hr_employee_self_only.group_hr_employees_no') else [(1, '=', 1)] if user.has_group('hr.group_hr_manager') or user.has_group('hr.group_hr_user') else ['|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('id', '=', user.employee_id.id)]
HR Employee Public: internal users read self; HR officers read all

['|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('id', '=', user.employee_id.id)] if user.has_group('hr_employee_self_only.group_hr_employees_no') else [(1, '=', 1)] if user.has_group('hr.group_hr_manager') or user.has_group('hr.group_hr_user') else ['|', ('user_id', '=', user.id), ('id', '=', user.employee_id.id)]
